description: Add configSchema with optional instanceUrl to the PostHog plugin so users with self-hosted PostHog instances can configure their custom domain. The existing us.posthog.com and eu.posthog.com SaaS patterns are preserved.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/posthog && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add configSchema with instanceUrl to PostHog plugin
userStories.description: Add a configSchema property with an optional instanceUrl field of type 'url' to the PostHog plugin class and package.json opentabs field. Keep existing SaaS urlPatterns and homepage.
acceptanceCriteria: PostHogPlugin class has `override readonly configSchema: ConfigSchema` with an `instanceUrl` field of type 'url', required: false
package.json opentabs field has a `configSchema` object with the same `instanceUrl` definition
Existing `urlPatterns: ['*://us.posthog.com/*', '*://eu.posthog.com/*']` is preserved in both src/index.ts and package.json
